description: Parapet wall or guardrail at roof edge is missing, damaged, or below required 42-inch height
visual_signals: low or crumbling parapet wall
missing guardrail sections
bent or leaning railing posts

description: Roof hatch is open and unattended without surrounding guardrail protection
visual_signals: hatch lid in open position
no guardrails around hatch opening
hatch propped open with no barrier

description: HVAC equipment lacks required service clearance or access panels are obstructed by stored materials
visual_signals: materials stacked against equipment housing
less than 36 inches clearance around unit
access panel blocked by adjacent equipment

description: Tripping hazards from unsecured conduit runs, pipe supports, or abandoned materials on roof surface
visual_signals: cables or conduit crossing walkway
raised pipe supports without marking
debris and abandoned materials on roof

description: Ponding water on roof surface indicating blocked drains or inadequate slope for drainage
visual_signals: standing water pool on membrane
dark water stain ring pattern
debris blocking roof drain

description: Roofing membrane shows visible tears, blisters, or punctures exposing underlying substrate
visual_signals: torn membrane flap
raised blister bubbles on roof surface
exposed insulation or decking through membrane

description: Equipment covers or panels are unsecured and could become wind-borne projectiles
visual_signals: loose panel lifted at corner
missing fasteners on equipment cover
sheet metal flapping or displaced

description: Lightning protection system components are damaged, disconnected, or missing conductors
visual_signals: severed lightning conductor cable
corroded or missing air terminal
disconnected bonding jumper

description: Fall protection anchor point appears corroded, loose, or improperly mounted to structure
visual_signals: rust on anchor base plate
anchor post wobbling or leaning
missing bolts in anchor mounting

description: Roof access ladder is missing safety cage, has damaged rungs, or lacks anti-climb device when required
visual_signals: fixed ladder without cage above 24 feet
bent or missing ladder rungs
no anti-climb plate or locked cover

description: Designated rooftop walkway path markings faded, missing, or walkway pavers displaced creating unsafe route conditions
visual_signals: faded or missing painted walkway lines on roof surface
displaced or broken walkway paver sections exposing membrane
no marked route visible between roof access point and equipment

description: Walkway surface lacking non-slip treatment or traction pads creating slip hazard in wet conditions
visual_signals: smooth walkway surface with no visible traction treatment
worn or peeling anti-slip coating on designated path
missing traction strips on walkway pavers near equipment

description: Skylight lacks required fall protection such as screens, guardrails, or rated covers per OSHA standards
visual_signals: unguarded skylight dome flush with roof surface
skylight without surrounding guardrail or safety screen
cracked or deteriorated skylight cover that would not support a worker fall

description: Rooftop solar panel installation obstructing required setback from roof edge or blocking access pathways
visual_signals: solar panels installed within three feet of roof edge with no setback
no clear pathway visible between solar panel rows for maintenance access
solar panel array blocking access to rooftop equipment

description: Solar panel conduit or wiring in poor condition with exposed conductors, damaged raceways, or improper grounding
visual_signals: cracked or split conduit exposing solar wiring on roof surface
loose or unsecured solar panel cables lying across roof membrane
missing or corroded grounding conductor at solar panel mounting frame

description: Cooling tower missing guardrails, has damaged access ladder, or shows no chemical treatment indicators
visual_signals: cooling tower platform without perimeter guardrails
bent or corroded cooling tower access ladder rungs
no chemical treatment feed equipment or test port visible on cooling tower basin

description: Cooling tower showing signs of biological growth, scale buildup, or drift eliminator damage indicating Legionella risk
visual_signals: green algae or biofilm visible in cooling tower basin or fill media
heavy white scale deposits on cooling tower surfaces and nozzles
broken or missing drift eliminator sections on cooling tower discharge

description: Satellite dish or antenna mounting hardware deteriorated with loose guy wires, corroded brackets, or missing grounding
visual_signals: slack or disconnected guy wire on rooftop antenna mast
rusted or cracked antenna mounting bracket on parapet
missing or corroded grounding wire from antenna base to building ground

description: Rooftop crane or davit base with missing cover plates, corroded anchor bolts, or absent rated load signage
visual_signals: open davit socket without protective cover plate exposing recessed base
visibly corroded or missing anchor bolts at crane base plate
no rated load capacity sign posted at davit or crane base location

description: Pipe penetration through roof membrane with deteriorated flashing, failed sealant, or missing counter-flashing
visual_signals: cracked or separated sealant around pipe boot flashing
rusted or lifted counter-flashing at pipe penetration
daylight or gap visible between pipe and roof flashing collar

description: HVAC refrigerant leak indicators visible at rooftop unit including oil stains at fittings or green-blue corrosion on copper lines
visual_signals: dark oil stain at refrigerant line fitting or service valve
green or blue-green corrosion deposits on copper refrigerant tubing
frost formation on refrigerant line at location inconsistent with normal operation

description: Condensate drain from rooftop HVAC not properly routed causing ponding, membrane damage, or freeze hazard on walkways
visual_signals: condensate water discharging directly onto roof membrane creating wet area
algae or mineral staining trail from HVAC condensate drain across roof surface
ice formation on walkway from HVAC condensate drain discharge in cold weather

description: Electrical disconnect for rooftop equipment missing, unlabeled, not accessible, or lacking weatherproof enclosure
visual_signals: electrical disconnect box with missing cover or door exposing internal components
no equipment identification label on rooftop electrical disconnect
disconnect enclosure showing rust-through or water intrusion damage

description: Fall protection warning signage missing from controlled access zones, warning line perimeters, or roof edge danger areas
visual_signals: warning line stanchions without required danger signs at six-foot intervals
no controlled access zone signage at unguarded roof edge work area
faded or missing rooftop fall hazard warning sign at access point

description: Warning line system improperly installed with lines below 34 inches, stanchions too far apart, or lines closer than six feet to edge
visual_signals: warning line sagging well below waist height between stanchions
warning line stanchions spaced more than six feet apart
warning line positioned less than six feet from unprotected roof edge

description: Helicopter landing pad markings faded, obstruction clearance compromised, or weight limit signage missing where helipad is present
visual_signals: faded or partially obscured helipad circle and H marking on roof surface
equipment or materials stored within helipad approach clearance zone
missing weight limit or wind direction indicator at rooftop helipad

description: Window washing davit equipment showing corrosion, missing rigging inspection tags, or tieback anchors in poor condition
visual_signals: heavy corrosion or rust on window washing davit arm or base
missing or expired rigging inspection tag on window washing davit
corroded or loose tieback anchor points used for window washing operations

description: Parapet cap flashing loose, rusted, or showing sealant failure allowing water infiltration into wall assembly
visual_signals: lifted or displaced metal cap flashing section on parapet top
rust streaks running down parapet face from deteriorated cap flashing
open joint or failed sealant bead between cap flashing sections

description: Roof ballast gravel displaced exposing underlying membrane to UV damage and wind uplift vulnerability
visual_signals: bare membrane patches visible where ballast gravel has been displaced
gravel piled unevenly with thin coverage areas near roof edge
exposed membrane showing UV degradation in areas without ballast cover

description: Roof drain or scupper blocked by debris, covered with ballast, or showing signs of inadequate flow capacity
visual_signals: leaves and debris accumulated over roof drain strainer basket
ballast gravel covering or surrounding roof drain preventing water entry
water staining pattern indicating overflow at scupper or drain location
